properties.descricao: Belgium have been granted the right to appeal FIFA's decision to overturn US striker Folarin Balogun's suspension, The Athletic reported on Monday, which reportedly took place after an intervention from US President Donald Trump.

properties.titulo_evento: Jehovah's Witnesses fight German state for Holocaust archive
